name: hata
description: Hata — Flask app for parsing eri2.nca.by / au.nca.by real estate and showing it on a Leaflet map

scripts.build: python3 -m compileall -q app run.py && python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'.'); from app import create_app, config, db, houses, pages; from app.api import views; from app.parser import runtime, engine; print('build OK: all modules import')"
